serverInfo.name: Bilig WorkPaper
serverInfo.description: Formula-backed WorkPaper MCP tools for workbook reads, input edits, recalculation, formula validation, and JSON persistence.

tools.name: list_sheets
tools.description: List sheets and their current used dimensions.

tools.name: read_range
tools.description: Read evaluated values and serialized cell contents for a WorkPaper range.

range.description: A1 range. Include a sheet name or pass sheetName separately.

sheetName.description: Default sheet name when range omits a sheet name.

tools.name: read_cell
tools.description: Read one cell with evaluated value, display value, formula, and serialized content.

tools.name: set_cell_contents
tools.description: Set one WorkPaper cell. Start the server with --writable to persist the updated WorkPaper JSON file.

value.description: Raw cell content. Formula strings must start with =.

tools.name: get_cell_display_value
tools.description: Return the formatted display value for one WorkPaper cell.

tools.name: export_workpaper_document
tools.description: Export the current WorkPaper JSON document.

tools.name: validate_formula
tools.description: Validate formula syntax using the WorkPaper formula parser.

resources.name: workpaper_manifest
resources.title: WorkPaper MCP Manifest
resources.description: Live manifest of the current WorkPaper file, available tools, prompts, resources, and verification contract.

resources.name: workpaper_agent_handoff
resources.title: WorkPaper Agent Handoff
resources.description: Compact instructions for agents that need to edit workbook formulas without spreadsheet UI automation.

resources.name: workpaper_sheets
resources.title: WorkPaper Sheets
resources.description: Current sheet names and used dimensions for the loaded WorkPaper document.

resources.name: workpaper_current_document
resources.title: Current WorkPaper Document
resources.description: Current persisted WorkPaper JSON document as exported from the in-memory engine.

prompts.name: edit_and_verify_workpaper
prompts.title: Edit And Verify WorkPaper
prompts.description: Guide an agent through a safe WorkPaper edit: read before, validate target, write one cell, read computed output, export JSON, and report proof.

arguments.name: target_cell
arguments.title: Target Cell
arguments.description: Optional sheet-qualified A1 target such as Inputs!B3.

arguments.name: output_range
arguments.title: Output Range
arguments.description: Optional dependent output range to read after recalculation, such as Summary!A1:B5.

prompts.name: debug_workpaper_formula
prompts.title: Debug WorkPaper Formula
prompts.description: Guide an agent through formula validation and readback when a WorkPaper formula or dependent output looks wrong.

arguments.name: formula
arguments.title: Formula
arguments.description: Optional formula text, including the leading =.

arguments.name: cell
arguments.title: Cell
arguments.description: Optional sheet-qualified A1 cell that contains or should contain the formula.

arguments.name: symptom
arguments.title: Symptom
arguments.description: Optional description of the wrong value, parse failure, or behavior being debugged.
